QA-07 -001 MEDIUM P2
Failed: Test qa07 html lang attribute set
https://dev.mehadedu.com/en test_qa07_html_lang_attribute_set 2026-06-12 10:54:50 15.01s
What this test was checking
HTML element must have a lang attribute set to a valid language code — verified against https://dev.mehadedu.com/en.
Test data used
BASE_URL
Steps to Reproduce
  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Observe the result: it does NOT match what the test expected (see Actual Behavior)
What should happen
HTML element must have a lang attribute set to a valid language code.
What actually happened
The test could not load the page within 15000ms — the server is too slow or unreachable.

What this test was checking

  1. Open a browser and go to https://dev.mehadedu.com/en
  2. Click the 'Log In' button in the page header

What should happen
Login modal must use role='dialog' for screen reader accessibility.
